## 📌 Description
Added a live current time display on the dashboard header along with dynamic greeting updates based on the current time of day.

Implemented a real-time countdown timer for upcoming tasks to improve deadline visibility and task tracking.

## 🔗 Related Issue
Closes #<issue_number>

## 🛠 Changes Made

- Added reusable LiveClock component for real-time current time display
- Updated greeting text dynamically (Morning / Afternoon / Evening)
- Added live countdown timer for upcoming tasks
- Added overdue task detection and display
- Improved dashboard task preview interactivity
